stories.title: RBC Heritage R1 — Åberg 8-Under 63 Leads Harbour Town (FOLLOW-UP)

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Ludvig Åberg cleaned up his game after the Masters — and it showed.

8-under 63 leads the RBC Heritage after R1. Hovland and English one back. Scheffler lurking at 3-under after an OB opener.

Harbour Town is wide open.

#GolfFanrecap #RBCHeritage #PGATour

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
RBC Heritage R1 leaderboard:

1. Åberg — 63 (-8)
2. Hovland — 64 (-7)
2. H. English — 64 (-7)
T4. Fowler/Fitzpatrick/Woodland +others — 65 (-6)
...
Scheffler — 68 (-3)

No Rory. No cut. This is anyone's tournament.

#GolfFanrecap #RBCHeritage

article.headline: RBC Heritage Round 1: Åberg Leads Harbour Town After Masters Redemption

stories.title: McIlroy Back-to-Back Masters Champion — Week Off, Legacy Secured (FOLLOW-UP)

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Rory McIlroy has two Masters in a row.

He joins Nicklaus (1965-66), Faldo (1989-90), and Tiger (2001-02) as the only back-to-back champions.

Six majors. Week off. Legacy secured.

#GolfFanrecap #Rory #TheMasters

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
McIlroy won $4.5M at Augusta — and will lose $1.9M of it to US taxes.

Still. Back-to-back Green Jackets. Six majors. Tied with Faldo as the greatest European major winner ever.

"I want more."

#GolfFanrecap #Rory

article.headline: Rory McIlroy's Back-to-Back Masters: Six Majors, One Untouchable Legacy

stories.title: Scheffler OB Opener at RBC Heritage — World No. 1 Bounces Back (FOLLOW-UP)

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Scottie Scheffler's first swing at Harbour Town went out of bounds.

He re-teed. Hit the fairway. Hit his approach inside 12 feet. Made the putt for bogey.

Then shot 68. Still 3-under.

World No. 1 things.

#GolfFanrecap #Scheffler #RBCHeritage

article.headline: Scheffler's OB Opener: World No. 1 Starts Rough, Bounces Back at RBC Heritage

stories.title: LIV Golf Mexico City R1 — Victor Perez 9-Under 62 Leads (FOLLOW-UP)

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Victor Perez opened LIV Golf Mexico City with a 9-under 62.

Three shots ahead of Jon Rahm heading into Round 2.

Perez is one of LIV's newest additions in 2026. He looks right at home.

#GolfFanrecap #LIVGolf

article.headline: LIV Golf Mexico City Round 1: Victor Perez Fires 9-Under 62 to Lead

stories.title: LPGA JM Eagle LA Championship R1 — Chizzy Iwai Leads, Yu Liu Aces 15th (FOLLOW-UP)

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Chizzy Iwai leads the LPGA JM Eagle LA Championship after Round 1 — 9-under 63.

Two shots clear of Patty Tavatanakit.

Oh, and Yu Liu made a hole-in-one on the 15th today.

#GolfFanrecap #LPGA #JMEagle
